_readme: Edit the paths below once your Obsidian vault is set up. Until then, use test mode only.
accepted_path: PLACEHOLDER — set this to your Obsidian vault Accepted/ folder path
published_path: PLACEHOLDER — set this to your Obsidian vault Published/ folder path
_pii_patterns_readme: These are the patterns that cause a file to be BLOCKED from publishing.
_financial_fields_readme: These frontmatter fields are ALLOWED in Published files. All other financial data is stripped.
_required_provenance_readme: Every file must have ALL of these fields or it is blocked from publishing.
